universal.label: Universal Constraints
universal.description: Limited default guardrails that apply to every schedule. Studio, trainer, and class-specific rules must be created and saved from Settings.

UNIV-001.description: Barre 57 family must be >= 25% of total weekly classes at any location
UNIV-001.title: UNIV-001

UNIV-002.description: Every active studio day must include AM and PM coverage; use midday coverage where demand and qualified trainers support it
UNIV-002.title: UNIV-002

UNIV-003.description: Saturday should be a high-load day, without violating weekly floors, trainer caps, or quality gates
UNIV-003.title: UNIV-003

UNIV-004.description: Sunday may carry AM and PM coverage when targets require it; no Sunday class should start before 10:00
UNIV-004.title: UNIV-004

UNIV-006.description: Express class must be paired with full-length equivalent on same day
UNIV-006.title: UNIV-006

UNIV-007.description: Studio Recovery must never be first class of day
UNIV-007.title: UNIV-007

UNIV-009.description: Avoid long trainer runs; keep consecutive assignments practical and respect the 4 assigned hours/day cap
UNIV-009.title: UNIV-009

UNIV-010.description: No trainer may exceed 4 assigned hours in one day
UNIV-010.title: UNIV-010

UNIV-012.description: Strength Lab ONLY at Kwality House
UNIV-012.title: UNIV-012

UNIV-013.description: Pre/Post Natal is not auto-scheduled unless manually pinned or saved as a hard custom rule at an eligible location
UNIV-013.title: UNIV-013

UNIV-014.description: Peak midday slot must never be empty
UNIV-014.title: UNIV-014

UNIV-015.description: Prioritize at least one strong Barre 57 family option in the AM block every active day
UNIV-015.title: UNIV-015

UNIV-016.description: Prioritize strong Barre 57 or Cardio Barre coverage in weekday PM demand windows
UNIV-016.title: UNIV-016

UNIV-017.description: Prioritize Tier 1 trainers for primary peak slots where qualified and available
UNIV-017.title: UNIV-017

UNIV-019.description: Specialist classes no substitution with non-certified
UNIV-019.title: UNIV-019

UNIV-020.description: Trainer location history is a preference signal, not a hard block, unless saved as a custom rule
UNIV-020.title: UNIV-020

UNIV-021.description: Do not schedule proven low-performing class/trainer/slot histories unless manually pinned; unsupported formats require explicit custom rules
UNIV-021.title: UNIV-021

UNIV-022.description: A trainer cannot be scheduled across 2 locations in the same shift
UNIV-022.title: UNIV-022

UNIV-023.description: Same class formats must not be scheduled consecutively
UNIV-023.title: UNIV-023

UNIV-024.description: No classes before 07:00, between 13:00-15:00, or after 20:30
UNIV-024.title: UNIV-024

UNIV-025.description: Every trainer must have at least 1 weekly off day; 2 is preferred when coverage allows, and no trainer may exceed 2 days without assignments unless unavoidable
UNIV-025.title: UNIV-025

UNIV-026.description: Recovery sessions must be the last class in their shift at that location
UNIV-026.title: UNIV-026
